title: false and 0
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, bool_col BOOLEAN, int_col INT);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, bool_col, int_col) VALUES (1, FALSE, 0);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, bool_col, int_col) VALUES (2, TRUE, 1);
SELECT id, bool_col, int_col FROM test_table WHERE bool_col = FALSE;
SELECT id, bool_col, int_col FROM test_table WHERE int_col = 0;
key_bug_features: Inconsistent handling of boolean and integer types
